title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Account deletion flow in Poly Studio Mobile app successfully logs out user and removes account from Cloud tenant after confirmation
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in to a Lens tenant account.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap the delete icon (trash/bin icon) next to the account.
5. Observe the confirmation dialog that appears.
6. Tap the Cancel button on the dialog.
8. Again tap the delete icon next to the account.
9. Tap the Confirm button on the dialog.
expected: 1. After tapping Cancel (step 6): The dialog closes and the user is returned to Settings > General with the Account tab expanded. The user remains logged in and their account is still present on the Cloud tenant. 2. After tapping Confirm (step 9): A spinner is shown briefly, then an "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly. The user is moved back to Settings > General with the Account tab expanded and is logged out. The Cloud tenant is updated accordingly (account removed).
